name: Pinealon
subtitle: Synthetic Tripeptide | Neuroprotection & Cognitive Enhancement

modifications: Synthetic bioregulator with direct DNA interaction capabilities

overview: Developed in Russia, Pinealon demonstrates unique DNA-interaction for neuroprotection and cognitive enhancement. Benefits traumatic brain injury recovery and age-related cognitive decline with excellent safety profile.
mechanism: Penetrates nuclear membranes to directly interact with DNA, modulates gene expression via histone H1.3 binding and MAPK/ERK pathway activation.
keyBenefits: 40+ years of clinical use in Russia

items.name: Traumatic Brain Injury
items.description: Clinical protocol of 5mg daily showed significant cognitive improvements in 72-patient study.

items.name: Direct CNS Delivery
items.description: Subcutaneous administration allows systemic circulation to brain tissue for neuroprotective effects.

items.name: Cellular Protection
items.description: Caspase-3 suppression, ROS reduction, and excitotoxicity protection.

items.name: Memory Enhancement
items.description: Enhanced neurotransmitter function with 1.9x serotonin increase in cell cultures.

items.name: NMDA Receptor Expression
items.description: 100 ng/kg optimal dose improved spatial learning in hippocampus.

items.name: Cellular Senescence Reduction
items.description: Irisin expression increases linked to telomere protection and mitochondrial enhancement.

items.name: Biological Age Markers
items.description: 32-patient study showed significant improvements in aging indicators over 20-30 days.

deliveryMethods.overview: Highest bioavailability, direct systemic delivery, established clinical protocols.

steps: Remove powder and water from refrigeration
Clean vial tops with alcohol swabs; allow to dry
Inject water slowly down vial side to avoid foam

deliveryMethods.overview: Convenient, proven clinical efficacy. Ultra-short peptide structure survives gastric acid.
Theoretical nose-to-brain delivery, potential rapid CNS access. Limited data available.

interactions.notes: Enhanced neuroprotection through complementary telomerase activation pathways.
Synergistic cognitive recovery in stroke patients through brain region targeting.
Safe combination supporting neural-immune axis optimization.
Monitor sleep patterns; Pinealon stimulates endogenous serotonin production.
Different mechanisms with no known interactions.

stopSigns: Signs of infection at injection site

good: White crystalline powder; proper freeze-drying indicated
Clear reconstituted solution; no particles or cloudiness
Pharmaceutical packaging with batch numbers from reputable sources
warning: Ensure distinction between research (lab only) and pharmaceutical (human use) grade
bad: Discolored powder (yellow or brown) indicates degradation from heat or moisture

references.title: Human Clinical Trial - Post-Traumatic Cerebrasthenia
references.keyFindings: 72 patients aged 30-74; 0.2mg twice daily; 20-30 days. Improved memory, reduced headache severity, and enhanced emotional stability compared to controls.

references.title: Aging Study - Polymorbidity Patients
references.keyFindings: 32 patients aged 41-83; variable dosing; 30 days. Significant improvements in biological aging biomarkers with anabolic effects.

references.title: Diabetic Rat Model - Spatial Learning
references.keyFindings: 100 ng/kg optimal dose; 14 days. Enhanced NMDA receptor expression in hippocampus with neuroplasticity improvements.

references.title: 5xFAD Alzheimer's Mouse Model
references.keyFindings: 400 μg/kg IP daily; 28 days. Prevention of dendritic spine loss through MAPK/ERK pathway modulation.

quickStats.typicalDose: Injectable: 5mg daily or 100-300mcg daily; Oral: 0.2mg twice daily
quickStats.frequency: Injectable: daily for 20 days; Oral: morning and afternoon on empty stomach
quickStats.storage: Refrigerate at 2-8°C, use within 30 days after reconstitution
